objective: Benchmark contamination auditing for code models and code APIs.
threat_model: Leakage or pre-exposure to benchmark prompts, hidden tests, or semantic canary variants.

wrapper.selection_rule: chronology-aware semantic-canary alignment with confidence reranking

full_eval_live_policy: do_not_silently_downgrade_live_to_mock; keep review_status tied to benchmark review and mark unresolved live traces as unscored runtime records
